assertions.title: Codex OAuth end-to-end — browser-based PKCE flow

steps.expected: Settings page loads with OAuth Connections section showing Codex backend with Connect button
steps.observed: Settings page loaded. OAuth Connections section shows 'codex Status: Not connected' with 'Connect' link (href=/ui/oauth/login/codex)

steps.expected: Browser redirects to auth.openai.com/authorize with PKCE parameters

steps.action: Complete real OAuth flow with OpenAI credentials
steps.expected: User authenticates and is redirected back to settings with Connected status
steps.observed: BLOCKED: Cannot complete real OAuth flow — no real OpenAI credentials available. PKCE parameters were correctly generated and the redirect to auth.openai.com was successful.

evidence.network: GET /ui/settings -> 200; Click Connect -> redirect to auth.openai.com/authorize with PKCE params (code_challenge, code_challenge_method=S256, response_type=code, state, redirect_uri, scope)

assertions.issues: Cannot complete the full OAuth flow without real OpenAI credentials. Verified PKCE flow initiation works correctly including redirect URL with all required parameters.

assertions.title: All existing functionality preserved — regression check

steps.observed: Dashboard loaded showing: 10 requests, 10 errors, 177ms avg latency, 3 backends listed (codex, copilot, openrouter) with per-backend breakdown, and a table of 10 recent requests

steps.expected: Settings page loads with all backends listed
steps.observed: Settings page loaded with OAuth Connections section showing copilot and codex backends, API Keys section, Named Clients section, and Appearance section
Playground loaded with model text input, API key selector, temperature/max-tokens/top-p sliders, system prompt field, and chat input
Returns models from copilot (gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, o3, o3-mini, o4-mini, claude-sonnet-4, gpt-4o-mini), codex (o4-mini, gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.3-codex, codex-mini), and openrouter (many models)

evidence.network: GET /health -> 200; GET /v1/models -> 200 with all 3 backends' models; GET /ui/ -> 200; GET /ui/settings -> 200; GET /ui/playground -> 200

assertions.title: Playground with OAuth backend — chat through Copilot or Codex

steps.observed: Playground loaded with model text input field

steps.action: Type 'copilot/gpt-4o' in model field and send 'Hello, test message'
steps.expected: Request is sent; response displayed (may fail due to no Copilot token)
steps.observed: Message sent. Response shows error: '502 Bad Gateway: backend error: copilot backend copilot: failed to get token: Copilot token exchange failed'

steps.expected: Error displayed inline, no crash, no empty page
steps.observed: Error message displayed inline in the chat area with a warning icon. Page remains fully functional — sidebar, model input, and chat input all still work. No crash, no empty page.

evidence.network: POST /v1/chat/completions with model copilot/gpt-4o -> 502 with descriptive error about Copilot token exchange failure

assertions.title: Error path — no GitHub token available for Copilot backend

steps.expected: Returns clear error (502/503) about missing/failed Copilot token
steps.observed: Returns HTTP 502 with JSON body: {"error":{"message":"backend error: copilot backend copilot: failed to get token: Copilot token exchange failed: copilot token refresh: copilot token exchange: unexpected status 404: {\"message\":\"Not Found\"...}","type":"proxy_error"}}

steps.action: Navigate to /ui/settings and check copilot status
steps.observed: Settings page shows 'copilot Status: Not connected' with a 'Check Status' button

evidence.network: POST /v1/chat/completions {model:copilot/gpt-4o} -> 502 with descriptive error; GET /ui/settings -> 200 showing 'Not connected' status

assertions.title: OAuth callback error handling — invalid state or denied authorization

steps.expected: Response redirects to /ui/settings with an error message

steps.action: Verify error message on settings page
steps.expected: User-friendly error message displayed, no stack trace
steps.observed: Settings page displays 'OAuth callback failed: codex oauth callback: invalid or expired state parameter' at the top of the main content area. This is a clear, user-friendly message — no stack trace visible.

steps.action: Verify Codex shows 'Not connected' after callback error
steps.observed: Settings page shows 'codex Status: Not connected' with Connect link still available

blockers.description: VAL-CROSS-002: Cannot complete real OAuth PKCE flow for Codex — no real OpenAI credentials available. The PKCE flow initiation works correctly (redirect to auth.openai.com/authorize with proper parameters), but the full end-to-end flow cannot be tested without authenticating with OpenAI.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A — this is a credential availability issue, not a technical issue

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-002: cannot complete real OAuth without OpenAI credentials), 0 skipped. All existing functionality (dashboard, settings, playground, health, models) works correctly with OAuth backends present. Error handling is graceful — invalid callback state shows user-friendly error, failed Copilot token exchange returns clear 502 error, playground displays errors inline without crashing.
